rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0020
rows.name:
We can't pinpoint the cause of the radio interference.
We still can't even confirm our surroundings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0030
rows.name:
What about communications
with the assault team?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0050
rows.name:
They may simply be unable
to get a signal through.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0060
rows.name: Keep hailing them from our side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0080
rows.name: We have no choice but to trust them and wait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0110
rows.name:
I just thought that sounded unusually
reliable coming from you.[ST:wait ]
